title: Slovakian Fluffy Pilaf
description: A classic Slovakian dish made with fluffy rice and pilaf. It's an easy to make and flavorful side dish perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the fluffy rice and slovakian pilaf and stir until well combined.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it sit for 5-10 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
